coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in is likely about whether Nina’s recent high output as a Senior Frontend Engineer is sustainable and supported, not just impressive.
openingQuestion: What is still driving your load now that the sprint push is over, and where would more visibility or support from me make the biggest difference?
listenFor: whether she names specific work she is still carrying from the sprint versus new priorities
whether she downplays the late nights without giving a concrete reason the load remains high
if they point to a stakeholder, forum, or decision where her work is not getting visibility or influence
avoid: do not praise the feature delivery so heavily that it crowds out the sustainability conversation
do not jump straight into reallocating work before you understand which priorities and influence gaps matter most to her
goodOutcome: You and Nina have agreed which one or two priorities define success for the next two weeks and where you will add manager leverage so her senior-level execution is more sustainable and visible.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one concrete example of Nina’s recent impact and one specific instance where her work may have lacked visibility, so you can ground the conversation without making it abstract.
